# Canic

Canic is a Rust toolkit and `canic` operator CLI for Internet Computer
canister fleets. It provides lifecycle/build macros, topology config,
stable-memory helpers, endpoint guards, thin-root artifact builds, and local
install, snapshot, backup, and restore workflows.

Install the published operator binary:

```bash
cargo install --locked canic-cli --version <same-version-as-canic>
canic --version
```

From this checkout:

```bash
make install
```

Full setup details live in `README.md` and `INSTALLING.md`.
